data.HISTORY: No new complaints. Vital signs stable. Continue current management plan. Discussed treatment options and plan at multidisciplinary meeting. Follow-up imaging shows stable disease. Labs within acceptable range.
data.PURPOSE: Discussed treatment options and plan at multidisciplinary meeting. Follow-up imaging shows stable disease. Labs within acceptable range. Neutropenia noted; growth factor support initiated per protocol. Pathology reviewed; margins clear. Recommend adjuvant therapy.
